1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="bi-dialog--header bi-drawer--header" data-no-border="true"> <span class="bi-logo" data-dark="true" data-international="false" data-size="medium"></span> <form action="/om-bi/presserom/" met
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="bi-navbar main-navbar" data-dark="false" data-fixed="true"> <a class="bi-skip-link" href="#maincontent"> Gå til hovedinnhold </a> <header class="bi-navbar__header"> <a
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h2 class="bi-dialog--header bi-drawer--header" data-no-border="true"> <span class="bi-logo" data-dark="true" data-international="false" data-size="medium"></span> <form action="/om-bi/presserom/" met
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (29 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="bi-skip-link" href="#maincontent"> Gå til hovedinnhold </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til studentportalen'

<a class="bi-button" data-variant="text" href="https://portal.bi.no/" target="_blank"> Gå til studentportalen <span class="bi-button--end-icon">
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til studentportalen'

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

For studenter | Muligheter | BI

https://www.bi.no:443/studere-ved-bi/for-studenter/
Avvik: 44 | Bestått: 133

SVG is missing accessible name

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="bi-dialog--header bi-drawer--header" data-no-border="true"> <span class="bi-logo" data-dark="true" data-international="false" data-size="medium"></span> <form action="/studere-ved-bi/for-st
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="bi-card--header-title">Internship</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="bi-navbar main-navbar" data-dark="false" data-fixed="true"> <a class="bi-skip-link" href="#maincontent"> Gå til hovedinnhold </a> <header class="bi-navbar__header"> <a
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h2 class="bi-dialog--header bi-drawer--header" data-no-border="true"> <span class="bi-logo" data-dark="true" data-international="false" data-size="medium"></span> <form action="/studere-ved-bi/for-st
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (11 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="bi-skip-link" href="#maincontent"> Gå til hovedinnhold </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til studentportalen'

<a class="bi-button" data-variant="text" href="https://portal.bi.no/" target="_blank"> Gå til studentportalen <span class="bi-button--end-icon">
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="bi-button" data-variant="text" href="https://portal.bi.no/" target="_blank"> Gå til studentportalen <span class="bi-button--end-icon">
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://portal.bi.no/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">studentportalen</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="AACSB-link" href="https://www.aacsb.edu/accreditation" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank"> <span class="bi-footer--aacsb"></span> </a>

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="AMBA-link" href="https://www.associationofmbas.com/" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank"> <span class="bi-footer--amba"></span> </a>

Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="bi-skip-link" href="#maincontent"> Gå til hovedinnhold </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til studentportalen'

<a class="bi-button" data-variant="text" href="https://portal.bi.no/" target="_blank"> Gå til studentportalen <span class="bi-button--end-icon">
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="bi-button" data-variant="text" href="https://portal.bi.no/" target="_blank"> Gå til studentportalen <span class="bi-button--end-icon">
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

First heading is h2, should start with h1

Start your heading structure with h1

MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="bi-skip-link" href="#maincontent"> Gå til hovedinnhold </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til studentportalen'

<a class="bi-button" data-variant="text" href="https://portal.bi.no/" target="_blank"> Gå til studentportalen <span class="bi-button--end-icon">
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="bi-button" data-variant="text" href="https://portal.bi.no/" target="_blank"> Gå til studentportalen <span class="bi-button--end-icon">
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="bi-dialog--header bi-drawer--header" data-no-border="true"> <span class="bi-logo" data-dark="true" data-international="false" data-size="medium"></span> <form action="/studier-og-kurs/sokna
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Opprett en søknad</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3

SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h2 class="bi-dialog--header bi-drawer--header" data-no-border="true"> <span class="bi-logo" data-dark="true" data-international="false" data-size="medium"></span> <form action="/studier-og-kurs/sokna

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (11 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="bi-skip-link" href="#maincontent"> Gå til hovedinnhold </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til studentportalen'

<a class="bi-button" data-variant="text" href="https://portal.bi.no/" target="_blank"> Gå til studentportalen <span class="bi-button--end-icon">
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="bi-button" data-variant="text" href="https://portal.bi.no/" target="_blank"> Gå til studentportalen <span class="bi-button--end-icon">
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://bi.no --max-pages 21 --format html
